description: Leading data science initiatives across research departments. Building ML pipelines, conducting statistical analyses, and developing predictive models for academic research projects.
Researching Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems and Large Language Models. Developing novel approaches to knowledge extraction and domain-specific fine-tuning.
Analyzed large-scale datasets to derive business insights. Created automated reporting dashboards and implemented data quality frameworks that reduced errors by 35%.
Built analytics infrastructure from ground up. Designed KPI tracking systems, developed user behavior models, and created data-driven product recommendations.
